title: lobelia delisseana
intro: Lobelia delisseana, also known as Indian tobacco or asthma plant, is a perennial plant belonging to the Lobelia genus. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and antispasmodic effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia delisseana include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory function, and acting as a natural cough suppressant. Lobelia delisseana can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential side effects and interactions.
